name: HMS En Avant (FY 1743)
events: 18 Apr 1944 After a few days of trials off Sheerness HMS Seraph (Lt. T. Russell-Walling, RN) departed that port for Portland. She was escorted by HMS Pincher (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.B. Blake, RNVR) until 0915/19 when HMS En Avant (T/Skr. W. Bradshaw, RNR) took over the escort. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
